xsl:if.test: parameters/parameter[@hide = 'n' and @distinction = 'y' and not(contains($informacje_wyroznione_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($gender_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($age_group_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($kolor_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($material_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($informacje_wyroznione_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($waga_nazwa_w_panelu,@name)) and not(contains($pojemnosc_nazwa_w_panelu,@name)) ]/@name

xsl:variable.name: detail_get
xsl:variable.select: parameters/parameter[@hide = 'n' and @distinction = 'y' and not(contains($informacje_wyroznione_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($gender_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($age_group_nazwa_w_panelu, @name)) and not(contains($kolor_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($material_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($informacje_wyroznione_nazwa_w_panelu, concat('|',translate(@name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters),'|'))) and not(contains($waga_nazwa_w_panelu,@name)) and not(contains($pojemnosc_nazwa_w_panelu,@name)) ]/@name

xsl:when.test: (../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN10' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN8' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN14' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN12' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'UPCE') and @code_producer!='' and not(starts-with(@code_producer, '2') or starts-with(@code_producer, '02') or starts-with(@code_producer, '04'))
